role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) that seeks to provide investors with exposure to commodity assets. The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of the value of its assets in instruments that provide exposure to commodities. Commodities are assets such as metals, oil, natural gas, or agricultural products. The fund is non-diversified.
